codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the prior blocking gap by adding paired layout-variant fixtures and direct assertions that expanded text/reference families preserve identical parser-facing provenance and resolved entity projections across equivalent layouts. The remaining changes stay within the shared fixture test surface, and I did not find a correctness issue in the follow-up patch.

summary: Pass: reviewed the original failing commit 8c96475 and the fix commit 8e165de. The follow-up closes the missing equivalent-layout coverage by adding layout-variant-a/layout-variant-b plus equivalent_layout_variants_preserve_expanded_family_identity_on_parser_and_resolved_surfaces, which compares expanded-family parser provenance and resolved entity projections across both variants.
